title: Policy: Policy applied - Restart Headset - Settings stay locked
scenario: Policy-locked settings remain locked after headset power cycle on Poly Bluetooth audio device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and select the connected Poly headset.
3. Go to Device Settings and apply a policy that locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
4. Confirm the policy is applied and the affected settings appear locked/disabled in the app UI.
5. Press and hold the Power button on the headset to turn it off.
6. Wait a few seconds, then press and hold the Power button again to turn the headset back on.
7. Reconnect the headset to the Poly Studio Mobile app (if not auto-connected).
8. Navigate to Device Settings → Audio Settings and check the settings that were locked by the policy.
expected: The policy-locked settings remain locked/disabled in the app after the headset is turned off and on again.
